title: piper adenophorum
intro: Piper adenophorum, also known as Long Pepper or Indian Long Pepper, is a flowering plant native to the Western Ghats in India. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Piper adenophorum include its ability to aid digestion, relieve pain and inflammation, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
